scenarioLine: You ordered in Dutch. The cashier answered you in English.

options.text: Switch to English too. Honestly? A little relieved.
"Mag ik het in het Nederlands proberen?"
Say nothing, then think of the perfect Dutch reply on the bike home.

reveal: No winner here. Pick whichever one is honestly you. But if C is your reflex and you wish it weren't, B is the smallest way out: one sentence, no confrontation, still in Dutch.
